product_overview: Backend APIs for VoiceERP providing authentication, purchases, sales and inventory/items management. Exposes REST endpoints for listing and creating purchases and sales, and for inventory visibility, secured by token-based auth.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication for API consumers
Support creating and listing purchases to record incoming stock
Support creating and listing sales to record outgoing stock
Expose inventory and items listing to reflect current stock
Return clear error responses for invalid requests or insufficient permissions/stock

features.name: Auth API
features.description: Authenticate users and issue JWT tokens used to authorize other API calls.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid username/password -> Receive 200 with JWT token in response body
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with authentication error

features.name: Purchases API
features.description: List purchases and create new purchases (incoming stock). Created purchases update inventory quantities.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/purchases with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list of purchases
GET /api/purchases without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized error
POST /api/purchases with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid purchase payload (items and quantities) -> Receive 201 Created with created purchase record
POST /api/purchases with Authorization: Bearer <token> and invalid payload (missing required fields) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token

POST /api/purchases with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid purchase payload -> Receive 201 Created with created purchase record -> GET /api/items with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with updated item quantities reflecting the purchase

features.name: Sales API
features.description: List sales and create new sales (outgoing stock). Sales decrease inventory and must validate stock availability.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/sales with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list of sales
GET /api/sales without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized error
POST /api/sales with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid sale payload (items and quantities within available stock) -> Receive 201 Created with created sale record
POST /api/sales with Authorization: Bearer <token> and sale payload where requested quantity exceeds available stock -> Receive 400 Bad Request with insufficient stock error
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token

POST /api/sales with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid sale payload -> Receive 201 Created with created sale record -> GET /api/items with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with updated item quantities reflecting the sale

features.name: Inventory & Items API
features.description: List items and current inventory status so clients can view stock levels.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/items with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list of items and quantities
GET /api/items without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized error
